violations.claim: REACHABLE: At line 244, execution has irrevocably committed to calling runVerifyOnly.
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: [NEW]
; LINE: 244
; REACHABLE: At line 244, execution has irrevocably committed to calling runVerifyOnly.
; The only violation output path (lines 251-252) is inside if(ci).
; For interactive users (ci = false), runVerifyOnly is called but its results
; are never printed and process.exit(1) is never called.
(declare-const ci Int)                ; 1 = args.includes("--ci"), 0 = not set
(declare-const violations Int)        ; report.violations returned by runVerifyOnly
(declare-const violations_printed Int) ; 1 = violation count was written to stdout
(declare-const exit1_called Int)      ; 1 = process.exit(1) was called
; Code transition: runVerifyOnly is called after line 244 regardless of ci value
; (it is unconditional, before the if(ci) block)
(assert (> violations 0))
; Code transition: lines 251-252 and process.exit(1) are inside if(ci) block
(assert (=> (= ci 0) (= violations_printed 0)))
(assert (=> (= ci 0) (= exit1_called 0)))
; Interactive user: ci = false
(assert (= ci 0))
; Violation: violations found, nothing communicated, process exits 0
(assert (= violations_printed 0))
(assert (= exit1_called 0))
(check-sat)
